title: Linked Lists, Nodes, and Pointer Invariants · Correctness Defense
summary: Build a mutable work queue where stable node links matter more than random access. Every item uses a fresh case and misconception-specific distractors. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for a linked structure with diagrammed invariants. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Trace singly and doubly linked node references without losing head, tail, or reachability.
Insert and delete at boundaries while preserving connectivity and size invariants.
Implement traversal with termination evidence and malformed-cycle protection.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
